creator: never@nevermind.kiev.ua
text:
vICQ is a simple ICQ client written in Perl with look & feel of micq and 
works fine with v7 protocol of ICQ. It is based on Net::ICQ2000 module 
written by Robin Fisher <robin@phase3solutions.com> and slightly modified 
by Alexander Timoshenko <gonzo@ukrweb.net>

Author: Alexander Timoshenko <gonzo@ukrweb.net>
WWW: http://gonzo.kiev.ua/projects/vicq/

How-To-Repeat: N/A
